properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It's hard to imagine that I've been there too I've felt the passion burning in you Every temptation, oh, I understand Your savior knows what it is to be a man

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Promise me… promise me… Before the passion turns to flame Promise me you'll call my name Promise me… promise me… You'll remember these scars of grace And remember I took your place Promise me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I know what it's like when the Nightmare comes true Someone left a cross for me Like they left for you Trust me when I say… I've been Where you are The strength to live again my child is Hidden in the scars

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: For those who stand, for those who fall Strength is found in one place Beneath my cross crying out for grace.
